drills.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: This book is read by me.
sentences.hindi: यह किताब मेरे द्वारा पढ़ी जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: this book is read by me

sentences.english: This work is done by him.
sentences.hindi: यह काम उसके द्वारा किया जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this work is done by him

sentences.english: This letter was written by her.
sentences.hindi: यह letter उसके द्वारा लिखा गया।
sentences.pronunciation: this letter was written by her

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: The food is cooked by mother.
sentences.hindi: खाना माँ के द्वारा बनाया जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the food is cooked by mother

sentences.english: This house was built by my grandfather.
sentences.hindi: यह घर मेरे दादा जी ने बनाया था।
sentences.pronunciation: this house was built by my grandfather

sentences.english: This song is sung by her.
sentences.hindi: यह गाना उसके द्वारा गाया जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this song is sung by her

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: This question was asked by me.
sentences.hindi: यह प्रश्न मेरे द्वारा पूछा गया।
sentences.pronunciation: this question was asked by me

sentences.english: This photo is taken by me.
sentences.hindi: यह फोटो मेरे द्वारा खींची जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: this photo is taken by me

sentences.english: This decision was taken by the team.
sentences.hindi: यह decision team के द्वारा लिया गया।
sentences.pronunciation: this decision was taken by the team

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: This letter is delivered by the postman.
sentences.hindi: यह पत्र डाकिये द्वारा पहुँचाया जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this letter is delivered by the postman

sentences.english: This mistake was made by him.
sentences.hindi: यह गलती उसके द्वारा की गई।
sentences.pronunciation: this mistake was made by him

sentences.english: This report is prepared by me.
sentences.hindi: यह रिपोर्ट मेरे द्वारा तैयार की जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: this report is prepared by me

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: This book was written by the author.
sentences.hindi: यह किताब लेखक द्वारा लिखी गई थी।
sentences.pronunciation: this book was written by the author

sentences.english: This project is completed by the team.
sentences.hindi: यह project team के द्वारा पूरा किया जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this project is completed by the team

sentences.english: This mistake was made by the students.
sentences.hindi: यह mistake छात्रों द्वारा की गई।
sentences.pronunciation: this mistake was made by the students

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: These awards are given every year.
sentences.hindi: यह awards हर साल दिए जाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: these awards are given every year

sentences.english: This car is driven by him.
sentences.hindi: यह गाड़ी उसके द्वारा चलाई जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: this car is driven by him

sentences.english: This email was sent yesterday.
sentences.hindi: यह email कल भेजा गया था।
sentences.pronunciation: this email was sent yesterday

drills.title: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: This problem was solved.
sentences.hindi: यह समस्या हल की गई।
sentences.pronunciation: this problem was solved

sentences.english: These books are given to children.
sentences.hindi: यह किताबें बच्चों को दी जाती हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: these books are given to children
